steps.title: Read the concession
steps.content: The underlined phrase begins with "While," which concedes a limitation: public bathhouse amenities were available mainly to town dwellers, not to everyone in medieval Europe.

steps.title: Identify the function
steps.content: A invents a rural-versus-urban popularity claim, B shifts the limitation to historians' studies, and D invents Halloway's research motive. The underlined portion acknowledges that not all medieval Europeans had access to public bathhouses. The answer is C.
